_comment: Synthetic HDFC credit-card YEAR-END golden vector (no real data). Ported from the web engine's test_cc_reader_characterization.py _HDFC case; values captured from a live run of hdfc.reader.read_lines. Year-end layout: DD-Mon-YYYY <desc> <amount> DR|CR, marker mid-line (trailing card number ignored). period_end = last day of the closing month (MARCH-26), period_start = first day of the opening month (APRIL-25).
lines: 16-Apr-2025 ONLINE TRF - PYMT RECD - THANK YOU 10,610.00 CR 526873XXXXXX9070
full_text:
HDFC Bank Credit Cards

04-Apr-2025 WWW EXAMPLE COM GURGAON 1,071.00 DR 526873XXXXXX9070
